{

"judge_id": "judge_1",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.1": 5,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "R1.7": 4,
  "RX.1": 1,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "The agent identifies multiple conceptual issues and provides specific reframing suggestions, showing a strong understanding of the draft's framing.",
  "R1.4": "The critique points out gaps but doesn't map against multiple prior works, only addressing specific deltas.",
  "R1.7": "Flags missing citations and suggests audits, indicating good citation engagement without full coverage.",
  "RX.1": "No discussion of uncertainty or confidence levels in the critique.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within scope, effectively critiquing the related work section.",
  "RX.4": "Identifies harmful patterns like unsupported claims without introducing new errors.",
  "RX.5": "Suggests adding citations but doesn't annotate all changes with sources."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.85,
  "RX.1": 0.95,
  "RX.3": 0.9,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.8
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies multiple conceptual issues and provides specific reframing suggestions, showing a strong understanding of the draft's framing.
rationale.R1.4: The critique points out gaps but doesn't map against multiple prior works, only addressing specific deltas.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations and suggests audits, indicating good citation engagement without full coverage.
rationale.RX.1: No discussion of uncertainty or confidence levels in the critique.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within scope, effectively critiquing the related work section.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful patterns like unsupported claims without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Suggests adding citations but doesn't annotate all changes with sources.
